title: Trump threatens Iran with ‘Hell’ over Strait of Hormuz in profane post
summary_full: Trump escalated threats against Iran’s power plants, bridges and other infrastructure in an expletive-laden post on Truth Social on Easter morning.
summary_public: Trump escalated threats against Iran’s power plants, bridges and other infrastructure in an expletive-laden post on Truth Social on Easter morning.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump threatens Iran with ‘Hell’ over Strait of Hormuz
